name: Kwan Phayao city core and civic-retail band
notes: Phayao city, civic uses, retail, hospital, and lakefront activity suited to destination charging rather than pure highway stopover.

name: Route 1 Mae Ka - Pratu Chai urban spine
notes: Primary roadside corridor between University of Phayao, city approach, and through-traffic on Route 1 where fast charging can make business sense.

name: Dok Khamtai east-side connector
notes: District-to-city connector on Route 1021 with local service demand and moderate roadside potential.

name: Chiang Kham service town
notes: District service center with hospital, retail, and local trips; useful to keep eastern Phayao demand from disappearing entirely.
